name: Transmeta unveils smaller microprocessors (Crusoe TM5700/TM5900 launch)
description: IDG News Service report (via Computerworld) on Transmeta's launch of the Crusoe TM5700 and TM5900 x86-compatible processors at 1 GHz in a 21mm-by-21mm package — half the size of the TM5800 — targeting set-top boxes, thin clients, blade servers, portable consumer products. 512KB (TM5900) or 256KB (TM5700) L2 cache, 64-bit DDR SDRAM controller, 32-bit PCI controller, integrated Northbridge. Kastner (Aberdeen EVP/CRO) flags ongoing TM5800 performance complaints (HP TC100 tablet example): 'not been good enough for many of today's applications.'
